mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO operator_carry_rate (id, char_id, carry_count,sample_size, create_time, questionnaire_code, start_time, end_time,record_type) VALUES
(#{item.id},#{item.charId}, #{item.carryCount}, #{item.sampleSize}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.questionnaireCode},#{item.startTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.recordType})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM operator_carry_rate WHERE start_time >= #{startTime} AND end_time < #{endTime}
